result.reason: The issue describes problems with UI layout stability after display/panel renaming and resolution changes (docking/undocking), indicating a defect in UI state management.
result.approach: Investigate how DockPanelLayoutLoader and DockPanelLayoutSaver handle panel identification (by name vs. persistent ID) and how display resolution changes are managed by the DockPanelSuite integration. Focus on ensuring panel layouts persist correctly across renames and display topology changes.
